COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-05-2003 Continued To Feb-20-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's motion for OSC re contempt
Appearance: Fredric Evenson and William Verick, (707)268-8900 for plaintiff; William N. Kammer and Amy Beckstead (858)638-6711 for defendant Ross Stores.
Final Ruling: Matter argued. Application for contempt for failure to post appropriate signs denied. Inadequate showing of willfulness. Application for contempt for failure to pay stipulated penalty was continued with conditions to 2-20-04 at 9:30 a.m. Counsel stipulated to use transcripts of depositions instead of life witnesses. Plaintiff to prepared order. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: C. LI; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620 (503)
